title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Embassy Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Embassy Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Embassy Group has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Embassy Group:
Embassy Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Embassy Group!
